item.title: Today is our 14th birthday. For 14 years, we’ve built and maintained Are.na inde...
item.description:
@aredotna

Today is our 14th birthday.

For 14 years, we’ve built and maintained Are.na independently with no institutional investors, sustained only by our members.

We (quite literally) would not be celebrating our 14 years if it weren’t for you.

Thank you ❤️❤️
item.content:encoded:
@aredotna

Today is our 14th birthday.

For 14 years, we’ve built and maintained Are.na independently with no institutional investors, sustained only by our members.

We (quite literally) would not be celebrating our 14 years if it weren’t for you.

Thank you ❤️❤️
item.author: aredotna

item.title: The Are.na Annual 2025 is here! This year, the book is themed “document,” as in ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (18 medier)

@aredotna

The Are.na Annual 2025 is here! This year, the book is themed “document,” as in to record, to provide information or support, an official paper, a piece of evidence, a form of proof. As always, this is a collection of writing from the people on Are.na, and each piece starts with a channel. This is our sixth Annual — we’re really proud of it and everyone involved.

To give you an idea of what’s inside, we published the editor’s letter, by co-editors @meggmillerr and @michellesantiagocortes, on Are.na Editorial.

Contributors include @theyeaye @willallstetter @hotemogf @raegan_bird @n4th4li4dutr4 @labud.nyc @jonathanfraser @luli_la_la @cbdknives @idiotartstudent Amelia K. @koziol.studio @ohnojoanne @jameslangdon.eu @marvinrenfordt @not_not_reuben @matthew__j__s @gerardo.ismael.madera @gloomdarling @sharoneema @foldyrhands @finneganshann0n @meewgumi @lunajyw @paprikiz

Cover design by @luli_la_la. Interior book design by Leslie Liu.

Link to buy in bio.

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (18 medier)

@aredotna

The Are.na Annual 2025 is here! This year, the book is themed “document,” as in to record, to provide information or support, an official paper, a piece of evidence, a form of proof. As always, this is a collection of writing from the people on Are.na, and each piece starts with a channel. This is our sixth Annual — we’re really proud of it and everyone involved.

To give you an idea of what’s inside, we published the editor’s letter, by co-editors @meggmillerr and @michellesantiagocortes, on Are.na Editorial.

Contributors include @theyeaye @willallstetter @hotemogf @raegan_bird @n4th4li4dutr4 @labud.nyc @jonathanfraser @luli_la_la @cbdknives @idiotartstudent Amelia K. @koziol.studio @ohnojoanne @jameslangdon.eu @marvinrenfordt @not_not_reuben @matthew__j__s @gerardo.ismael.madera @gloomdarling @sharoneema @foldyrhands @finneganshann0n @meewgumi @lunajyw @paprikiz

Cover design by @luli_la_la. Interior book design by Leslie Liu.

Link to buy in bio.

Se slideshow på Instagram
